flashcards.definition: Gastroesophageal reflux disease; chronic acid reflux damaging the esophagus.
Erosion of the stomach or duodenal lining; H. pylori and NSAIDs are common causes.
IBD that can affect any GI segment (mouth to anus); transmural inflammation.
IBD limited to the colon; superficial (mucosal) inflammation with continuous lesions.
Autoimmune disorder triggered by gluten; destroys intestinal villi → malabsorption.
